phase_title: Competition Prediction Runtime and Versioned Public-Safe API
activation_note: The human explicitly approved activation of the exact reviewed and installed COMP-B-v2 pack. Codex must execute only COMP-B, verify and apply only the canonical thirteen-patch payload producing exactly the eleven-file allowlist, perform no migration, database mutation, or real application network access, stop after Automation v2 Prepare, and must not activate or execute COMP-C in the same run.
